nouns/noun-morphology/proper-name-geniti.comment: Proper-name genitive rule keeps the periphrastic 'von' construction available.

nouns/noun-morphology/optional-plural-ma.comment: The -s plural marker is optional per the spec; the unmarked plural remains valid.

verbs-and-word-order/word-order/ditransi.comment: Ditransitive rule allows expressing the recipient with 'an' as an alternative to recipient-first order.
accept_also: Ich gebe die Buch an die Frau.

verbs-and-word-order/word-order/ditransi.comment: Ditransitive rule allows expressing the recipient with 'an' as an alternative to recipient-first order.
accept_also: Er zeigt die Stadt an die Kind.

verbs-and-word-order/word-order/ditransi.comment: Ditransitive rule imposes no strict order; the default recipient-first order is equally valid.
accept_also: Ich gebe die Frau die Buch.
